name: The Fool
description: The pathway of mystery and trickery. Fools are mystery planners who distort fate and bend reality through clever schemes and hidden power.

sequences.name: Seer
sequences.description: Can perceive fate threads and glimpse fragments of the future.

sequences.name: Bizarro Sorcerer
sequences.description: Masters minor distortions of reality and fate manipulation.

sequences.name: Witch
sequences.description: Skilled in hexes, curses, and binding contracts.

sequences.name: Faceless
sequences.description: Can alter appearance and steal the identities of others.

sequences.name: Marionettist
sequences.description: Controls others like puppets through fate strings.

sequences.name: Bizarro Sorcerer
sequences.description: Weaves complex illusions indistinguishable from reality.

sequences.name: Miracle Invoker
sequences.description: Calls upon miraculous events to reshape outcomes.

sequences.name: Attendant of Mysteries
sequences.description: An attendant to the mysteries of the cosmos, bending fate itself.

sequences.name: Mystery Pryer
sequences.description: Peers into the deepest mysteries and distorts fundamental truths.

name: The Magician
description: The pathway of performance, charm, and sealed artifacts. Magicians weave illusions and create powerful seals.

sequences.name: Apprentice
sequences.description: Learns the basics of magic and creates minor seals.

sequences.name: Trickmaster
sequences.description: Masters tricks and minor illusions that fool the senses.

sequences.name: Hypnotist
sequences.description: Can hypnotize individuals and implant suggestions.

sequences.name: Illusionist
sequences.description: Creates powerful illusions affecting multiple targets.

sequences.name: Mentalist
sequences.description: Reads minds and projects thoughts across distances.

sequences.name: Magician
sequences.description: A true master of the magical arts and performance.

sequences.name: Miracle Invoker
sequences.description: Invokes miracles through pure magical performance.

sequences.name: Sealed Artifact Specialist
sequences.description: Creates and handles extraordinarily powerful sealed artifacts.

sequences.name: Extraordinary
sequences.description: Achieves the apex of magical power and sealed artifact creation.

name: The High Priestess
description: The pathway of knowledge, mythical creatures, and ancient secrets. Priestesses commune with divine entities.

sequences.name: Secrets Suppliant
sequences.description: Seeks out hidden knowledge and ancient secrets.

sequences.name: Contractee
sequences.description: Forms binding contracts with supernatural entities.

sequences.name: Potions Artisan
sequences.description: Brews powerful potions using Beyonder ingredients.

sequences.name: Beast Tamer
sequences.description: Tames and commands mythical creatures and beasts.

sequences.name: Scarlet Scholar
sequences.description: Uncovers dark truths about the world's hidden history.

sequences.name: Mythical Creature
sequences.description: Partially transforms into a mythical creature.

sequences.name: Druid
sequences.description: Channels the power of nature and ancient lore.

sequences.name: Mythical Creature Creator
sequences.description: Can create and summon mythical creatures.

sequences.name: The High Priestess
sequences.description: Becomes a deity-like being of pure knowledge and myth.

name: The Empress
description: The pathway of charm, demoness powers, and alluring darkness. Empresses seduce and dominate.

sequences.name: Bard
sequences.description: Uses song and story to enchant those who listen.

sequences.name: Manipulator
sequences.description: Skilled at emotional manipulation and social control.

sequences.name: Artificer
sequences.description: Creates charm-infused items and enchanted objects.

sequences.name: Demoness
sequences.description: Gains demonic allure and supernatural charm.

sequences.name: Affliction Priest
sequences.description: Inflicts supernatural afflictions and curses.

sequences.name: Witch
sequences.description: Masters dark witchcraft and hexes.

sequences.name: Fallen Creator
sequences.description: Creates things twisted by demonic power.

sequences.name: Demoness of Pleasure
sequences.description: Embodies pleasure and dark desire as supernatural force.

sequences.name: Queen of Calamity
sequences.description: Becomes an avatar of calamity and irresistible power.

name: The Emperor
description: The pathway of iron will, authority, and commanding power. Emperors lead through unbreakable dominance.

sequences.name: Soldier
sequences.description: A trained warrior with enhanced physical capabilities.

sequences.name: Warrior
sequences.description: Excels in combat with superior strength and tactics.

sequences.name: Pugilist
sequences.description: Masters unarmed combat and physical force.

sequences.name: Gladiator
sequences.description: A battle-hardened champion who thrives in arenas.

sequences.name: Weapon Master
sequences.description: Achieves mastery over all manner of weapons.

sequences.name: Dawn Paladin
sequences.description: A holy warrior combining combat with divine power.

sequences.name: Demon Hunter
sequences.description: Hunts and slays demonic entities with specialized power.

sequences.name: Iron-Blooded Knight
sequences.description: Near-invincible warrior with iron will and body.

sequences.name: Tyrant
sequences.description: An absolute ruler whose very presence dominates others.

name: The Hierophant
description: The pathway of law, judgment, and divine authority. Hierophants enforce cosmic order.

sequences.name: Arbiter
sequences.description: Judges situations with supernatural fairness and wisdom.

sequences.name: Sheriff
sequences.description: Enforces law with Beyonder capabilities.

sequences.name: Interrogator
sequences.description: Extracts truth through supernatural interrogation techniques.

sequences.name: Justiciar
sequences.description: Delivers divine justice to transgressors.

sequences.name: Discipline Master
sequences.description: Commands absolute discipline and order.

sequences.name: Imperative Mage
sequences.description: Issues commands that must be obeyed by supernatural law.

sequences.name: Judge
sequences.description: A supreme judge whose verdicts carry cosmic weight.

sequences.name: Pale Emperor
sequences.description: Rules with absolute authority, pale as justice itself.

sequences.name: Demoness of Law
sequences.description: Paradoxically becomes a demonic enforcer of cosmic law.

name: The Lovers
description: The pathway of twilight, giants, and emotional bonds. Lovers harness the power of relationships and the space between day and night.

sequences.name: Daydreamer
sequences.description: Dwells in the twilight between dreams and waking.

sequences.name: Midnight Poet
sequences.description: Crafts verses with supernatural resonance and power.

sequences.name: Psyche Analyst
sequences.description: Analyzes and manipulates the psyche of others.

sequences.name: Dreamscape Artist
sequences.description: Creates and enters dream realms.

sequences.name: Twilight Giant
sequences.description: Channels the power of twilight giants.

sequences.name: Calamity Priest
sequences.description: Priest who invokes calamity through emotional bonds.

sequences.name: Strange Path
sequences.description: Walks a strange path between worlds and emotions.

sequences.name: Fallen Creator
sequences.description: Creates new things infused with twilight power.

sequences.name: Creator
sequences.description: Achieves the power to create new realities.

name: The Chariot
description: The pathway of speed, heroism, and spiritual warriors. Charioteers move with supernatural swiftness and battle spirits.

sequences.name: Hunter
sequences.description: Enhanced senses and tracking abilities of a skilled hunter.

sequences.name: Provoker
sequences.description: Provokes enemies and thrives in chaotic combat.

sequences.name: Dancer
sequences.description: Moves with supernatural grace and speed in combat.

sequences.name: Blade Alchemist
sequences.description: Infuses blades with alchemical and spiritual power.

sequences.name: Heroic Spirit
sequences.description: Channels the essence of legendary heroes.

sequences.name: Unshadowed
sequences.description: Exists beyond the reach of shadows and darkness.

sequences.name: Swordmaster
sequences.description: A transcendent master of the blade and combat arts.

sequences.name: Warlord
sequences.description: Commands battlefield energy and inspires supernatural valor.

sequences.name: Conqueror
sequences.description: Conquers all through unmatched speed and warrior spirit.

name: Justice
description: The pathway of order, light, and righteous power. Justice users wield holy light against darkness.

sequences.name: Priest of Light
sequences.description: A devoted priest who channels divine light.

sequences.name: Lightseeker
sequences.description: Seeks and wields the power of pure light.

sequences.name: Solar High Priest
sequences.description: High priest of solar divine power.

sequences.name: Notary
sequences.description: A notary of cosmic order who validates reality itself.

sequences.name: Faithful
sequences.description: Absolute faith grants supernatural protection and power.

sequences.name: Apothecary
sequences.description: Uses divine knowledge to heal and restore.

sequences.name: Bishop
sequences.description: Wields immense divine authority and holy power.

sequences.name: Cardinal of Sins
sequences.description: Paradoxically masters sin to uphold divine order.

sequences.name: Antigonus
sequences.description: Reaches godlike status through absolute righteousness.

name: The Hermit
description: The pathway of vision, foresight, and hidden knowledge. Hermits see what others cannot.

sequences.name: Clairvoyant
sequences.description: Sees events at great distances and through barriers.

sequences.name: Telepather
sequences.description: Reads thoughts and communicates mind to mind.

sequences.name: Psychiatrist
sequences.description: Treats and manipulates mental states.

sequences.name: Astrologer
sequences.description: Reads celestial omens and predicts future events.

sequences.name: Prophet
sequences.description: Receives true visions of what is to come.

sequences.name: Spectral Warlock
sequences.description: Wields spectral power over minds and spirits.

sequences.name: Omniscient Eye
sequences.description: Knows all that occurs within a vast range.

sequences.name: Seer
sequences.description: A supreme seer whose visions encompass all of fate.

sequences.name: Inevitable
sequences.description: Their prophecies become inescapable reality.

name: Wheel of Fortune
description: The pathway of luck, fate, and opportunity. Fortune users bend probability to their will.

sequences.name: Lucky One
sequences.description: Blessed with supernatural good luck in all endeavors.

sequences.name: Calamity Invoker
sequences.description: Calls misfortune down upon enemies.

sequences.name: Misfortune Witch
sequences.description: Curses enemies with chains of bad luck.

sequences.name: Lottery Mage
sequences.description: Manipulates probability for dramatic results.

sequences.name: Fate Weaver
sequences.description: Weaves the threads of fate for self and others.

sequences.name: Wheel Shaker
sequences.description: Shakes the wheel of fortune to reshape outcomes.

sequences.name: Calamity Personification
sequences.description: Becomes the living embodiment of calamity.

sequences.name: Luck Stealer
sequences.description: Steals luck directly from others to empower oneself.

sequences.name: Inevitability
sequences.description: Their fate becomes the fate of all around them.

name: Strength
description: The pathway of demonic power, raw strength, and primal force. Strength users tap into terrifying might.

sequences.name: Beastmaster
sequences.description: Commands beasts and gains bestial strength.

sequences.name: Ferosocial
sequences.description: Combines ferocity with social dominance.

sequences.name: Barbarian
sequences.description: Unleashes savage fury in battle.

sequences.name: Demon
sequences.description: Partially transforms into a demonic being of power.

sequences.name: Werewolf
sequences.description: Transforms into a powerful werewolf form.

sequences.name: Devil
sequences.description: Embodies the power of a true devil.

sequences.name: Primordial Demoness
sequences.description: Channels primordial demonic power.

sequences.name: Demon God
sequences.description: Ascends to near-divine demonic power.

sequences.name: Demoness Mother
sequences.description: The ultimate source of demonic power and creation.

name: The Hanged Man
description: The pathway of despair, sacrifice, and reversed perspectives. Hanged Men gain power through accepting loss.

sequences.name: Marauder
sequences.description: A cunning raider who takes what they need.

sequences.name: Shadow Hiding
sequences.description: Conceals self perfectly within shadows.

sequences.name: Gatekeeper
sequences.description: Guards and manipulates the gates between places.

sequences.name: Scammer
sequences.description: A supernatural trickster and fraud artist.

sequences.name: Werewolf
sequences.description: Transforms through acceptance of one's darker nature.

sequences.name: Parasite
sequences.description: Parasitically draws power from hosts.

sequences.name: Strange Path
sequences.description: Walks a strange inverted path outside normal reality.

sequences.name: Despair Summoner
sequences.description: Summons and weaponizes despair itself.

sequences.name: Hanged King
sequences.description: Rules from an inverted throne of sacrifice.

name: Death
description: The pathway of undeath, the underworld, and necromancy. Death users straddle the line between life and oblivion.

sequences.name: Gravedigger
sequences.description: Works with the dead and earns their cooperation.

sequences.name: Spirit Medium
sequences.description: Communicates with and summons spirits of the dead.

sequences.name: Corpse Collector
sequences.description: Collects and reanimates the dead.

sequences.name: Zombie Magician
sequences.description: Masters zombie creation and necromantic magic.

sequences.name: Undying
sequences.description: Achieves a form of immortality through undeath.

sequences.name: Wraith
sequences.description: Exists partially as a wraith, transcending physical limits.

sequences.name: Death Consul
sequences.description: Acts as a consul for death itself.

sequences.name: Gatekeeper of Death
sequences.description: Guards the ultimate threshold between life and death.

sequences.name: Death
sequences.description: Becomes an avatar of death itself.

name: Temperance
description: The pathway of amber, preservation, and ancient knowledge. Temperance users preserve and transmute.

sequences.name: Apothecary
sequences.description: Mixes potions and herbal remedies with Beyonder effect.

sequences.name: Archaeologist
sequences.description: Uncovers and analyzes ancient artifacts and sites.

sequences.name: Appraiser
sequences.description: Accurately appraises the value and properties of objects.

sequences.name: Scribe
sequences.description: Records and preserves knowledge with supernatural accuracy.

sequences.name: Artisan
sequences.description: Crafts objects of supernatural quality.

sequences.name: Amber Mage
sequences.description: Manipulates amber to preserve and trap.

sequences.name: Antiquarian
sequences.description: Masters all ancient knowledge and artifacts.

sequences.name: Timeless
sequences.description: Steps outside the flow of time.

sequences.name: Eternal
sequences.description: Achieves true immortality and eternal preservation.

name: The Devil
description: The pathway of contracts, vice, and dark bargains. Devils bind others through unbreakable agreements.

sequences.name: Criminal
sequences.description: Skilled in criminal arts and dark dealings.

sequences.name: Swindler
sequences.description: A supernatural con artist and manipulator.

sequences.name: Lawyer
sequences.description: Uses supernatural legal acumen to bind and manipulate.

sequences.name: Conspiracist
sequences.description: Weaves vast conspiracies that trap all involved.

sequences.name: Mentor
sequences.description: Guides others into dark bargains they cannot escape.

sequences.name: Baron of Corruption
sequences.description: A baron who spreads corruption and vice.

sequences.name: Desire Apostle
sequences.description: Weaponizes the desires of others against them.

sequences.name: Desire Embodiment
sequences.description: Becomes the living embodiment of desire and vice.

sequences.name: Inevitability
sequences.description: Their contracts become inescapable cosmic law.

name: The Tower
description: The pathway of fire, destruction, and explosive power. Tower users wield devastating elemental force.

sequences.name: Arsonist
sequences.description: Controls fire with natural ease and precision.

sequences.name: Fire Mage
sequences.description: Wields fire magic for both offense and utility.

sequences.name: Destruction Mage
sequences.description: Channels pure destructive magical force.

sequences.name: Red Priest
sequences.description: A priest of the red fire who blesses and burns.

sequences.name: Scorching Shaman
sequences.description: Shamanic fire user with elemental communion.

sequences.name: Demon Hunter
sequences.description: Hunts demons with fire and explosive power.

sequences.name: Inextinguishable
sequences.description: Cannot be extinguished, burning eternally.

sequences.name: Infernal Lord
sequences.description: Commands infernal fire and heat at will.

sequences.name: World Burner
sequences.description: Possesses the power to burn the entire world.

name: The Star
description: The pathway of the moon, mystery, and celestial navigation. Star users draw power from moonlight and celestial bodies.

sequences.name: Sailor
sequences.description: Reads stars for navigation and gains sea-faring abilities.

sequences.name: Enfeebler
sequences.description: Weakens enemies through celestial curses.

sequences.name: Shaman
sequences.description: Communes with lunar and celestial spirits.

sequences.name: Lunatic
sequences.description: Draws power from lunar cycles and madness.

sequences.name: Werewolf
sequences.description: Transforms under lunar influence into a werewolf.

sequences.name: Moon Priest
sequences.description: A devoted priest of the moon wielding lunar power.

sequences.name: Potions Apprentice
sequences.description: Brews lunar-infused potions of great power.

sequences.name: Moon Ritualist
sequences.description: Performs powerful rituals under moonlight.

sequences.name: Moon
sequences.description: Becomes an avatar of the moon itself.

name: The Moon
description: The pathway of evil dragons, corruption, and primal chaos. Moon users draw on draconic and corrupting power.

sequences.name: Dragon Seed
sequences.description: Bears the seed of draconic power within.

sequences.name: Chaos Hunter
sequences.description: Hunts through chaos and disorder.

sequences.name: Mind Corridor
sequences.description: Creates mental corridors to access hidden power.

sequences.name: Secret Sorcerer
sequences.description: Wields secret sorcery unknown to most.

sequences.name: Snake Blessed
sequences.description: Blessed by serpentine deities with venom and cunning.

sequences.name: Evil Dragon Priest
sequences.description: Serves evil dragons in exchange for corrupting power.

sequences.name: Soul Assimilator
sequences.description: Assimilates the souls of others to grow stronger.

sequences.name: Chaos Harbinger
sequences.description: Harbingers chaos wherever they go.

sequences.name: Evil Dragon
sequences.description: Becomes a full evil dragon of immense corrupting power.

name: The Sun
description: The pathway of solar light, eternal vitality, and holy radiance. Sun users shine with divine brilliance.

sequences.name: Bard
sequences.description: Spreads solar joy and light through song and story.

sequences.name: Light Mage
sequences.description: Commands light magic of blinding power.

sequences.name: Solar Mage
sequences.description: Wields the full might of solar magical power.

sequences.name: Electrician
sequences.description: Commands lightning as an expression of solar energy.

sequences.name: Dawn Paladin
sequences.description: A paladin blazing with the light of dawn.

sequences.name: Unshadowed
sequences.description: Stands beyond the reach of all darkness.

sequences.name: Eternal Blazing Sun
sequences.description: Blazes with eternal solar radiance.

sequences.name: Sun Priest
sequences.description: A supreme priest of the sun with divine solar power.

sequences.name: Sun
sequences.description: Becomes an avatar of the sun itself.

name: The World
description: The pathway of space, cosmos, and omnipresence. World users exist across all of space simultaneously.

sequences.name: Marauder
sequences.description: Ranges across vast distances with supernatural speed.

sequences.name: Escape Artist
sequences.description: Escapes any confinement and traverses any barrier.

sequences.name: Teleporter
sequences.description: Teleports self and others across any distance.

sequences.name: Omnipresent Seer
sequences.description: Sees across space to observe distant events.

sequences.name: Planeswalker
sequences.description: Walks between different planes of existence.

sequences.name: Spacetime Mage
sequences.description: Manipulates the fabric of spacetime.

sequences.name: World Door Keeper
sequences.description: Keeps the doors between worlds and controls passage.

sequences.name: Cosmos Traveler
sequences.description: Travels the cosmos at will.

sequences.name: The World
sequences.description: Encompasses the entire world in one's being.

name: Judgment
description: The pathway of absolutism, final verdicts, and the end of all things. Judgment users pass final sentence on the cosmos.

sequences.name: Criminal
sequences.description: An agent of dark judgment working in the shadows.

sequences.name: Secrets Suppliant
sequences.description: Supplies secrets to bring about final judgment.

sequences.name: Cyclops
sequences.description: A one-eyed judge who sees absolute truth.

sequences.name: Inevitability
sequences.description: Embodies the inevitability of all endings.

sequences.name: Arcanist
sequences.description: Master of arcane knowledge that leads to final truths.

sequences.name: Absolute Solver
sequences.description: Solves all problems with absolute finality.

sequences.name: Doomsday Harbinger
sequences.description: Heralds the coming of final doomsday.

sequences.name: Judgment Ruler
sequences.description: Rules over the domain of final judgment.

sequences.name: Absolute Calamity
sequences.description: Becomes the ultimate calamity that ends all things.
